ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year_label" TEXT /* Label for the academic year (e.g., 2001/02) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head FOREIGN KEY ("department_head") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "agg" INTEGER /* Aggregate performance metric value */,
  "c1" TEXT /* Performance descriptor for metric 1 */,
  "c1_minimum_number" INTEGER /* Minimum number for metric 1 */,
  "c1_minimum_parsed" INTEGER /* Parsed minimum value for metric 1 */,
  "c1_minimum_year" INTEGER /* Year of minimum performance for metric 1 */,
  "c1_maximum_number" INTEGER /* Maximum number for metric 1 */,
  "c1_maximum_parsed" INTEGER /* Parsed maximum value for metric 1 */,
  "c1_maximum_year" INTEGER /* Year of maximum performance for metric 1 */,
  "c2" INTEGER /* Performance descriptor for metric 2 */,
  "c2_number" INTEGER /* Number associated with metric 2 */,
  "c3" TEXT /* Performance descriptor for metric 3 */,
  "c4" TEXT /* Performance descriptor for metric 4 */,
  "c4_number" INTEGER /* Number associated with metric 4 */,
  "attendance_rate" TEXT /* Attendance rate for the student in the course */,
  "participation_rate" TEXT /* Participation rate for the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrolled student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course enrolled in */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric used for report generation */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* The data contained within the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., academic, attendance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, student) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_reports, manage_students) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
